summary: Sprint 27 AK Credits Economy testing. Backend: 25/25 tests pass. Frontend: All 6 features verified - KORE VAULT visible with 5 tools, INJURY PREVENTION ATTIVO for founder, ARENA ToolLock overlay working, NEXUS AIPromptBanner showing RISCHIO INFORTUNIO RILEVATO below TrainingTemplateCard, DNA RADAR PRO unlock flow functional, VAI AL KORE VAULT navigation works.

ui_bugs.issue: Dismiss X button lacks testID='prompt-dismiss' attribute — not accessible via automated testing selectors

integration_issues.flow: DNA RADAR PRO SBLOCCA unlock alert
integration_issues.issue: React Native Alert.alert() for '🔓 SBLOCCATO' does not trigger Playwright browser dialog event — cannot be captured via page.on('dialog'). Tool DOES unlock (shows ATTIVO, AK balance updates), but alert is not interceptable in Playwright web mode. Functionality is confirmed working via body text check.

action_items: Optional: Add testID='prompt-dismiss' to AIPromptBanner dismiss TouchableOpacity for automated testing

Note: STEFANO's AK balance is now lower than 650 seed due to unlock during testing (AI MATCHMAKER accidentally unlocked). If seeded state is needed, re-seed or reset STEFANO's unlocked_tools=[] and ak_credits=650 in MongoDB.

earn rules validated: nexus_scan=+10, pvp_win=+50, crew_battle_win=+100

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all features verified; minor Playwright limitation with React Native Alert dialog capture
